seal_broken.text: The shrine doors stand open. No guard broke them — the stone itself has been cut, clean as bread.

seal_broken.speaker: Maester Edrin
seal_broken.text: The seal... this took knowledge, not force. Three stones gone. Three.
In the dust of the floor: five sets of tracks, a day old. One of them favors the left foot.

seal_broken.speaker: Maester Edrin
seal_broken.text: The inner gate has closed itself again — the old trial. The keepers moved the warding stones to pass. So shall we.

warden_first.speaker: The Warden
warden_first.text: You come late, earth-child. The mountain counted on no one — and was right to.

warden_first.speaker: The Warden
warden_first.text: Three seeds of ruin walk north. The fourth sleeps before you. Keep it sleeping, or carry it — both have a price. I will not tell you which is greater.
The stone falls silent. You are no longer certain it spoke at all.
